wordplay_note: The twin — Fat's first-century alter ego who coexists with him
card_description: Thomas (apostle) (meaning "Thomas = twin (Aramaic)") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *VALIS*. First-century Christian apostle who Fat believes lives within him as a second personality. Name note: The twin — Fat's first-century alter ego who coexists with him. Temporal bilocation — the ancient twin inhabiting the modern self. First appears in *VALIS*.

reference.brief: First-century Christian apostle who Fat believes lives within him as a second personality
reference.significance: Temporal bilocation — the ancient twin inhabiting the modern self
